info.name: Insighta Labs+ - Stage 3 API
info.description: Complete API documentation for Insighta Labs+ Stage 3 with authentication, authorization, and profile management

item.name: Authentication
item.description: GitHub OAuth 2.0 with PKCE flow for secure authentication

query.description: Unique state parameter for CSRF protection

request.description:
Initiates GitHub OAuth flow with PKCE

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "authUrl": "https://github.com/login/oauth/authorize?..."
}
```

**Steps:**
1. Generate code_verifier (43-128 chars, URL-safe)
2. Derive code_challenge from code_verifier using SHA-256
3. Generate unique state parameter
4. Call this endpoint to get GitHub authorization URL
5. Redirect user to the authUrl

Handles GitHub OAuth callback for CLI

**Response (CLI):**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "user": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "username": "github_username",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "avatarUrl": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/...",
    "role": "analyst"
  },
  "tokens": {
    "accessToken": "eyJhbGc...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJhbGc...",
    "accessTokenExpiresIn": 180,
    "refreshTokenExpiresIn": 300
  }
}
```

**Note:** For web portal, use `client_type=web` to receive HTTP-only cookies instead

Handles GitHub OAuth callback for Web Portal

**Response (Web):**
- Sets HTTP-only cookies: `accessToken`, `refreshToken`
- Redirects to: `{{web_portal_url}}/dashboard`

**Cookies Set:**
- `accessToken`: HTTP-only, Secure, SameSite=Strict, MaxAge=180s
- `refreshToken`: HTTP-only, Secure, SameSite=Strict, MaxAge=300s

Refresh access token using refresh token

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "refresh_token": "eyJhbGc..."
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGc...",
  "refreshToken": "eyJhbGc...",
  "accessTokenExpiresIn": 180,
  "refreshTokenExpiresIn": 300
}
```

**Important:**
- Old refresh token is immediately invalidated
- New token pair is issued
- Prevents token reuse attacks

Logout user and invalidate all refresh tokens

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}`

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Logged out successfully"
}
```

**Effects:**
- All refresh tokens for user are revoked
- HTTP-only cookies are cleared (web portal)
- User must re-authenticate to access protected endpoints

Get current authenticated user information

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}`

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "username": "github_username",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "avatarUrl": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/...",
    "role": "analyst",
    "isActive": true,
    "lastLoginAt": "2024-04-27T10:30:00Z",
    "createdAt": "2024-04-27T10:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

List profiles with filtering, sorting, and pagination

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}`
- `X-API-Version: 1` (required)

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 10,
  "total": 2026,
  "total_pages": 203,
  "links": {
    "self": "/api/profiles?page=1&limit=10",
    "next": "/api/profiles?page=2&limit=10",
    "prev": null
  },
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "name": "John Doe",
      "gender": "male",
      "gender_probability": 0.95,
      "age": 28,
      "age_group": "adult",
      "country_id": "US",
      "country_name": "United States",
      "country_probability": 0.89,
      "created_at": "2024-04-27T10:00:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

**Roles:** Both analyst and admin can access

Get a specific profile by ID

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}`
- `X-API-Version: 1` (required)

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "name": "John Doe",
    "gender": "male",
    "gender_probability": 0.95,
    "age": 28,
    "age_group": "adult",
    "country_id": "US",
    "country_name": "United States",
    "country_probability": 0.89,
    "created_at": "2024-04-27T10:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

**Roles:** Both analyst and admin can access

Search profiles using natural language queries

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}`
- `X-API-Version: 1` (required)

**Query Parameters:**
- `q`: Natural language search query (e.g., "young males from nigeria")
- `page`: Page number for pagination
- `limit`: Results per page

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 10,
  "total": 45,
  "total_pages": 5,
  "links": {
    "self": "/api/profiles/search?q=young+males+from+nigeria&page=1&limit=10",
    "next": "/api/profiles/search?q=young+males+from+nigeria&page=2&limit=10",
    "prev": null
  },
  "data": [...]
}
```

**Roles:** Both analyst and admin can access

Create a new profile (Admin only)

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` (admin role required)
- `X-API-Version: 1` (required)
- `Content-Type: application/json`

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "name": "Harriet Tubman"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "name": "Harriet Tubman",
    "gender": "female",
    "gender_probability": 0.97,
    "age": 28,
    "age_group": "adult",
    "country_id": "US",
    "country_name": "United States",
    "country_probability": 0.89,
    "created_at": "2024-04-27T10:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

**Process:**
1. Calls agify API to get age
2. Calls genderize API to get gender
3. Calls nationalize API to get country
4. Stores enriched profile in database

**Roles:** Admin only (analyst will receive 403 Forbidden)

Delete a profile (Admin only)

**Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` (admin role required)
- `X-API-Version: 1` (required)

**Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Profile deleted successfully"
}
```

**Roles:** Admin only (analyst will receive 403 Forbidden)
